questions.template: What is the torque when a force of {f} N is applied perpendicular to the end of a {r} m wrench?
A force of {f} N is applied at {theta} degrees to a {r} m lever arm. What is the torque?
A {m} kg mass hangs from a horizontal beam {d} m from the pivot. What is the torque due to gravity? (Use g = 9.8 m/s²)
A wheel has a torque of {tau} N·m and a radius of {r} m. What tangential force is being applied at its edge?
